crime.value: Murder of a member of the Leavenworth household; method and central investigative question unknown from excerpt

closed_world.value: The Leavenworth house and household; a bounded domestic space with known inhabitants
closed_world.quote: I wish to inquire if everything is as before in the house; the servants the same

resolution.value: Mr. Gryce (investigator) systematically gathers evidence and testimony to identify the culprit through deduction
resolution.quote: MR. GRYCE RESUMES CONTROL; FINE WORK; GATHERED THREADS

investigator.value: A lawyer narrator (first-person) working with or observing detective Mr. Gryce's investigation
